And I think that the case study integration and content depth is something we've also talked about quite a bit.

like a bit

like, like,

Yeah, that totally makes sense.
Yeah, we'd love to kind of keep that channel open and keep chatting about it so we make sure that we're aligning all our different elements.

Conscious of Time, this piece, it kind of doubles down on a lot of what we were talking about already, just in terms of when we're looking at our strategy, we're looking at it in a two-prong way, right?

LLM visibility, and also not lose sight of the SEO growth, because that is still an important driver of organic traffic.

And so this just kind of more explicitly calls out how we're looking to approach content development in terms of, you know, identifying the right opportunities, validating it across keywords that we know are driving traffic and some other strategic bets we can make, like actually creating the content, making sure that it's sticky, and then really returning back to the metrics that we're seeing so that we're making sure that each piece of content that is engaging and driving traffic is enriched where we need it to be, and optimizing and all those different elements as well.
So don't want to belabor this too much, because I know we've used up quite a bit of our time already.
Another quick call out, just kind of looking at opportunities across some of those different strategies in terms of social research versus like known competitive gaps in SEO.
One of the things that we are looking at in terms of the sort of social research and social listening, slightly lower search volume.
But likely much higher intent.
So really going to be more likely to drive folks who are explicitly looking for a lot of the content and topics that we're developing.

And like I said, we also don't want to lose sight of this like really high volume area and some of these competitive gap topics that we know are, you know, going to drive traffic because of like other SEO signals that we're seeing in terms of keyword volume and things that are in that realm.
And so in one of the pieces that we looked at in terms of social research focus is really kind of doubling down on a lot of those AI transformation topics and expanding in that realm as well.
This is helpful.
I think as we evolve, obviously, we sort of like knock out topic by topic.
focus.

We are starting to bring more partners online.

Very targeted towards legal and compliance and HR leadership.
And so that's a whole different topic pillar that we might need to think about.

Very different from our core Udemy business offering, but it's a better together story.
And then we can weave that into the sort of overall Udemy business narrative.
So I think that there's examples like that where we probably should just sit down and do like a strategy planning session for the rest of the year anyway, as things are evolving.
love that.

around highlighting Teams content, but also making sure that we have a really good understanding of all the various products and services that you all really want to be highlighted within both the AI transformation topics and more broadly, so that we're framing those in the right way and really driving sort of that comprehensive experience across all those different elements.

So any documentation that you all have, like sales calls can be really helpful, but if there's other like written documentation, we can pull all that in into both our research and also inform our pipeline and how we're generating that content.

I did send over some of the 2026 roadmap stuff, but Jay and I had also discussed going through some of the sales calls again for some updated info, so that could potentially be something we could provide soon as well.
Definitely would be helpful.
The additional thing I would want to call out here, when we think about Teams, even potentially beyond just how to think about the messaging around that, I know we talked about things like
Like CTAs, another open question in my mind is like, should that inform the topics that we're going after in some meaningful way from an audience that would be more apt to go the team's route?
I'm not sure yet how to think about that.

I could see that that could be the case, but, you know, the more context and better we can understand how you all are thinking about that as you develop your plans, we can take that back and see how that involves our content strategy as well.
And also like, how should we think about it?
The greater priority is like what you all want to drive, like how much of our opportunity, our focus should be there.
Great.
Cause I personally, Udemy business is the solution.

like, think of teams as like a lightweight entry point into an enterprise deal.

A couple other pieces wanted to call out.

There's a couple different ways that we can look at that depending on sort of the easiest unlock here for you all.

And just to clarify, like not asking for like user data or anything, it'd be like aggregated, like based off like perhaps the blog, pages, whatever it may be.
So for some of our customers that will like automate exports that we can then reference and bring into our reporting.

And then the other piece, more of a call out, something Justin for you.
and I to connect on is making sure that we are really aligned in terms of the prompts and validating those specific AEO targets that we're going after.
I've been doing a little bit of work this week, and I'll share more with you next week.
We can connect about making sure that all those prompts are closely aligned in terms of what we're tracking and what you're tracking in BrightEdge and some of those different core goals.
Cool.
That sounds good.
Awesome.
All right.

At GrowthX, we've built an AI visibility tool similar to BrightEdge, but with some distinct advantages.
And so one of the things that we are looking at in this renewal is a complementary year of access for you all.

That have been like already been tracked.
And so anytime we want to add new topics instead of waiting for months for that data to come in across LLMs, you get more instant visibility and some different features there as well.
But wanted to call out that piece.

The TLDR here is essentially what we've built this tool for amongst many reasons, but it also will start to plug into what we call our content OS, which is where we're developing a lot of the content.
And so this will help us more meaningfully surface opportunities and work that into the pipeline of like flagging what are we creating, why, having that rich context.
So just a bit more of like a programmatic system, but also can provide access for you all to get that visibility into like the prompts, the trends, things of that nature as well.

Is this like a product offering that you're dangling in front of us with dollar signs or like how does that work?
Basically what we're doing here is for our customers, we're offering it as like a free access for the.
First year, you know, some customers have their own different AI visibility tools they may use.
Regardless if a customer would pay for access to this, we would still be leveraging it as a part of our workflow, our systems, our reporting as well.
It's more about like accessibility and customization.
Yeah, got it.

All good, all good.
Raph tax here.

And then just thinking through the fact that renewal, you know, end of April, believe our renewal date is April 26th with you all, and just how quickly time can fly, wanting to start the conversation around kind of where we're looking and make sure that, you know, I've
there's any open questions that you all have, things that you need to see, comfort level.

So looking at a flat renewal at 15K with some similar different elements to what we've got going right now, five articles a week, working on a lot of that enrichment that we've talked about, continuing to really dig into SEO support to make sure that those analytics are being driven, content audits so that we're optimizing everywhere that we need to, and a lot of this like SEO and AEO tracking.
And then the check that piece that we just mentioned as well, where you guys would get hands-on access.
So in looking this over, like any open questions that you guys have, any pieces that you really want to talk about as we look to move forward with all this?

And so then it's like there's more that you're doing beyond that.

So.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, align on 2026 goals, and discuss renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Initial Results:** GrowthX content now drives 60% of blog traffic (8x growth) and ranks for 800+ non-branded keywords on page one, validating the initial strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift to Business Impact:** The focus is moving from pure SEO to directly linking content to pipeline and ARR goals, using the blog as a sales enablement hub.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**Renewal Proposed:** A flat $15k/mo renewal was proposed for 5 articles/week, including content enrichment (visuals, case studies) and a free year of GrowthX's AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
  - [**Decision Pending:** Udemy will evaluate the proposal against internal priorities, with a decision targeted for the end of February to accommodate procurement timelines.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3586.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Alignment & Goals

  - [**Initial Goal:** Drive non-branded organic traffic to the blog by leveraging Udemy's gated content and expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [**New Goal (Stef Miller):** Shift focus from pure SEO to using the blog as a core sales enablement hub.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Augment internal capabilities (e.g., video, data viz) and provide authoritative content for sales to share with prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**Key Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [AEO performance & LLM share of voice.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Content enrichment (visuals, case studies).](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
      - [Directly linking content to business targets (pipeline, ARR).](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2479.0)

### Performance & Impact

  - [**Blog Traffic:** GrowthX content drives 60% of blog sessions, an 8x increase since publishing began in November.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [**Keyword Rankings:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [800+ non-branded keywords on page one.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [300+ in top 3 positions.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [600+ on page two, primed for future growth.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [**AEO Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [The "AI upskilling" article is a top Google result and a primary citation in the AI Overview.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [Udemy Business is cited directly in AI responses.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [**Attribution Challenge:** A significant portion of AI traffic appears as "direct" in analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
      - [**Reason:** AI engines (e.g., free ChatGPT plans) often don't pass referrer data.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
      - [**Impact:** This undercounts the true value of content, as 20–60% of AI traffic can be misattributed.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)

### Future Strategy & Renewal

  - [**Proposed Strategy:** A two-pronged approach balancing AEO and traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2925.0)
      - [**Social Research:** Capture early, high-intent topics before they have high search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2983.0)
      - [**Competitive Gaps:** Target known, high-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2983.0)
      - [**Content Enrichment:** Add visuals, case studies, and data tables to improve UX and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
  - [**Product Messaging:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
      - [**Teams Plan:** Position as a lightweight entry point to Enterprise.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3212.0)
      - [**New Partners:** Create content for new offerings like M-Train (compliance training).](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
  - [**Renewal Proposal:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
      - [**Cost:** Flat $15k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** 5 articles/week, content enrichment, SEO/AEO tracking, and content audits.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3544.0)
      - [**Bonus:** One free year of GrowthX's AI visibility tool, which offers faster data on new prompts than BrightEdge.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3388.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Udemy:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3586.0)
      - [Evaluate the renewal proposal against internal priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3586.0)
      - [Provide a decision by the end of February to meet procurement timelines.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3627.0)
      - [Share updated product documentation and sales call recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3114.0)
      - [Meet internally to define a GA4 event tracking strategy for organic content.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3667.0)
      - [Share the detailed strategy document.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2505.0)
      - [Align AEO tracking prompts with Udemy's BrightEdge setup.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3356.0)
      - [Record a Loom video explaining the "direct traffic" attribution issue.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)

action_items.description: Schedule GA4 event review w/ Kevin; then share plan w/ Katya + Kyle
Schedule DG team session re: owned-channel promo strategy
Schedule DG team session re: owned-channel promo strategy
Record + send Loom re: direct/AI attribution to Justin + Stef
Email elaborated strategy deck to Justin + Stef
Schedule strategy planning session w/ Stef re: sales convos + partner pillars
Email updated sales-call insights to Katya
Email AEO prompt alignment updates to Justin; then schedule alignment call
Review GrowthX proposal; decide renewal by Feb 28; notify Katya
